directive.title: Foundation data layer with Neon DB and core schema

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation for database infrastructure with Neon DB and Drizzle ORM, including connection pooling, health monitoring, and a comprehensive schema. However, the build is critically incomplete due to truncation - several required files (rfq-operations.ts, migration SQL, API routes) were not generated. Additionally, there are critical BUILDABILITY issues: imports of non-existent packages (drizzle-orm/neon-http, @neondatabase/serverless) and a missing logger utility will prevent compilation. The schema definition uses invalid TypeScript syntax with object spread. While the connection retry and query monitoring criteria are met, the missing CRUD operations, migration file, and API endpoints mean most acceptance criteria cannot be fully evaluated. The build requires significant fixes before it can be deployed.

top_issues.description: Imports 'drizzle-orm/neon-http' and '@neondatabase/serverless' which are NOT in package.json dependencies. This will cause build failure.
Imports '@/lib/utils/logger' which does not exist in the codebase. No logger utility was created or specified.
Imports '@/lib/utils/logger' which does not exist in the codebase.
